modmenu.summaryTranslation.swordhitbox: Extends attack reach on entities while holding a sword.
swordhitbox.name: SwordHitbox
swordhitbox.config.enabled.tooltip: When on, holding a sword grants extra entity-interaction range.
swordhitbox.config.reach_bonus.tooltip: Extra blocks of reach added while a sword is held. Clamped between 0 and 16.
